ydy-Job Opportunities

At the KHAS School of Foreign Languages, we prepare our students for the challenges ahead in the English-medium academic programs of Kadir Has University through comprehensive language instruction in our English Preparatory Program (EPP) and the Core Curriculum.

The EPP receives approximately 1000 new students every year, and its program plays a crucial role in supporting new students to acquire language capabilities and the academic foundation for a healthy transition to academic life in their faculties. The program also equips students with the essential skills for a tertiary environment by fostering academic literacy, critical thinking skills, and study skills.

We value academic integrity and standards in both of our programs, so we have high expectations of our students and ourselves. Institutionally, we embrace a willingness to thrive on hard work, readiness for new challenges, openness to new ideas, and commitment to professional development. Therefore, we invite English language instructors with excellent academic credentials to join us to make language learning a better experience.

Minimum Requirements to Meet

Applicants must meet the following requirements for their applications to be considered:

To fulfill the general and special conditions stated in the Higher Education Law No. 2547 and the “Regulation on the Procedures and Principles Regarding the Central Exam and Entrance Exams to be Applied in Appointments to Non-Teacher Staff,” published in the Official Gazette dated 9 November 2018;

For Turkish citizens:

● Have at least a Bachelor’s Degree in English Language Teaching or other related fields

●

To have a Master’s degree with a Thesis,

● To have at least three years of teaching experience in English Preparatory Programs of universities in Turkey

●  To submit a minimum YDS score of 90 or an equivalent score from an internationally recognized proficiency exam such as TOEFL.

For Non-Turkish citizens who are native speakers of English:

● Have at least a Bachelor’s Degree in English Language Teaching or other related fields

or

● Have at least a BA degree in any other field, a 2-year language teaching experience in an internationally recognized school/center, or a CELTA/DELTA certificate.

For Non-Turkish citizens who are non-native speakers of English:

● Have at least a Bachelor’s Degree in English Language Teaching or other related fields and a 2-year language teaching experience in an internationally recognized school/center, and a CELTA Certificate or DELTA

● Excellent command of spoken and written English

● Applicants who are non-native speakers of English also need to submit a minimum YDS score of 90 or an equivalent score from an internationally recognized proficiency exam such as TOEFL.

How to Apply

Applicants whose credentials meet the requirements should send an up-to-date curriculum vitae and a statement of teaching philosophy (2 pages maximum) to

[email protected]

before the announced deadlines.
